column1: Table 1. Selected soil properties from sites sampled across the elevation climate gradient on Mauna Kea. *Notes:* Properties include elevation, rainfall, <2 mm fraction, sand, silt, clay content (%), %C, %N, C/N, extractable Al + 1/2 Fe hydroxylamine content (Alh + 1/2 Feh; %), base saturation (%), cation exchange capacity, and soil pH (measured in a 1:1 mixture of soil and water) All values are reported as means, with SE in parentheses.
